author: IceWhaleTech
description: A powerful tool for port forwarding, reverse proxy, dynamic DNS, wake-on-LAN, IPv4 NAT traversal, webdav services, task scheduling, and automatic certificate management.

tips.before_install: Default login account `666`, Default login password `666`,tips:`Before each update, remember to back up the configuration`.

releaseNotes:
- v2.20.2 adds certificate sync support for Alibaba Cloud ESA and a Tencent Cloud option that is not yet open.
- Volcengine now sets the minimum TTL automatically based on the domain package.
- Generic OIDC third-party login support was added, ACME certificate application speed was optimized, and Filebrowser was updated to v2.45.0.
title: Lucky
